refnamediv.refpurpose: manage source-built Scilab toolboxes (git install, autoload, GUI picker)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The toolbox_manager module manages toolboxes built from source. It installs them from git (a local clone under ~/Projects/SciLabProjects or a remote jlmoya repository), records them in a manifest (SCIHOME/installed_toolboxes.tbx), and autoloads the enabled ones at startup. Toolbox macros become available only when their loader runs at base scope (the app startup file), which is why the GUI offers Apply & Relaunch.
